pnl_accuracy.note: Difference between predicted and actual P&L per trade

honest_accuracy_note.realistic_ceiling: 65–70% win rate on liquid prediction markets
honest_accuracy_note.what_drives_returns: Calibration quality × Kelly sizing × edge detection
honest_accuracy_note.why_not_98pct: Prediction markets price in all public information. 98% accuracy would require predicting the future. A well-calibrated 65% win rate with proper Kelly sizing is genuinely profitable and what professional traders target.
